race.comment: FREE TO FLY (8) will be better for her two narrow defeats at Ascot and Belmont, first-up. Draws out, but she hit the line well last time, and the longer sprint will suit. Ready to win. CELEBRITY ANGEL (6) steps up to 1200m for the first time. Was beaten 1.5L over 1000m at Ascot first-up, racing handy and is still well shy of her best. The gate is awkward, but Chris Parnham stays aboard, and she'll be right in the finish with average luck. UNIMANDO (4) was at long odds over 1200m at Ascot on debut, and he did a good job, beaten 2 lengths after a slow start. Taking that at face value, he's open to sharp improvement. Can get off the mark without surprise. PHOTOSYNTHESIS (13) resumed in the same race out of the market and finished a lip ahead of the above. Draws low again, and the blinkers go straight on. Has to be considered as well.
